title: Nav/GNC Design Review — 2024-06-12
text:
# Nav/GNC Design Review — 2024-06-12

**Attendees:** Lena Okafor, Rowan Ellery

## Summary

This page covers the thermal management approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Dev Patel on outstanding items.
